testcase.name: @BeforeMethod goToSignupPage
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.InvalidArgumentException: invalid argument (Session info: chrome=143.0.7499.192) Build info: version: '4.39.0', revision: '126f156aee' System info: os.name:
